title: Orthopedic Prosthetics and Orthotics Mission and Vision
content:
Orthopedic Prosthetics and Orthotics Mission and Vision

Mission:

Uskudar University Vocational School of Health Services / Orthopedıc Prosthetıc And Orthotıc Program aims to train students with the following features: Using technological devices, tools and equipment for prosthetics and orthotics, applying current techniques and applying them, giving importance to human health and ethical values.

Vision:

Uskudar University Health Services Vocational High School / Orthopedıc Prosthetıc And Orthotıc Program is to ensure that prestigious, qualified individuals who have gained international knowledge in the field of orthopedıc prosthetıcs and orthotıcs and preferred in employment in the public and private sectors are brought into the business life.
